text.title: Trunk-Based Branch by Abstraction Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for trunk-based-branch-by-abstraction.

conclusion.verdict: introduce Protocol/interface; file step-5 cleanup ticket
PR wraps legacy behind interface; no new implementation in this PR
PR adds new implementation behind interface; flag default off
ramp < 1% for full diurnal cycle; compare outputs; ratchet
delete wrapper + concrete + flag block; collapse abstraction if appropriate

text.example: step=3_implement_new → PR adds new Stripe v2 implementation behind PaymentProcessor interface; flag billing.use_stripe_v2 default off. Rule: no-mixed-step-prs.
